conversation.content: Welcome to AstraLearn AI! Your 21-day project to build a RAG-based job recommendation system sounds fantastic. To tailor your curriculum, could you clarify who the end-user is and what exactly the system will recommend? For example, are we matching resumes to job descriptions, or recommending jobs to candidates?
Got it, matching resumes to jobs is a great use case. To tailor the next 21 days, what is your current experience level with Python and Generative AI or LLMs?
Starting with no Python means we'll need to cover coding basics first. To fit this into 21 days, how many hours per day can you dedicate to studying and building?

Got it, 1-2 hours daily for 21 days is a tight but manageable window if we focus on essential Python and pre-built GenAI tools. To set our success target, how would you prefer to test your progress? Would you like hands-on coding milestones, conceptual quizzes, or a final project review?

counselorSignals.deliverable: RAG system matching resumes to job descriptions
counselorSignals.normalizedGoal: Learn Generative AI and build a RAG job recommendation system matching resumes to jobs
counselorSignals.targetOutcome: A functional RAG-based job recommendation prototype matching resumes to jobs

goalText: I want to learn Generative AI and build a RAG product recommendation system for jobs.
